category_sources: source_facts.description says text-mode videogame inspired by Pac-Man; official homepage https://myman.sourceforge.io/ describes MyMan as a text-mode videogame inspired by Namco's Pac-Man.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://myman.sourceforge.io/ and SourceForge project page https://sourceforge.net/projects/myman/ use the name MyMan.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface found; SourceForge project page provides releases, code, and project details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage https://myman.sourceforge.io/ links to browse the project's source code at myman.cvs.sourceforge.net.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official homepage, and SourceForge project details identify a text terminal Pac-Man-inspired game written in C.
